_comment: Odoo 20 PRE-GA STUB (expected late 2026). No verified deltas yet — falls back to Odoo 19 patterns per templates/cursor/skills/odoo/odoo-code-patterns/references/odoo-20-patterns.md. Reuses odoo-17 rule pack. When v20 GA ships: read changelog, populate odoo-20-patterns.md verified deltas, then revisit this preset.
description: Odoo 20 Community / Enterprise — Python 3.11+, OWL. PRE-GA STUB (expected late 2026) — patterns fall back to odoo-19 until GA changelog ships. Reuses odoo-17 rule pack.

stack._doc: Per-stack optional path overrides — used by realdata_test MCP. Leave empty to let user set <PREFIX>_ODOO_BIN / <PREFIX>_ODOO_CONF env vars at runtime.

_rules_comment: TODO: differentiate from odoo-17 base when v20 GA ships and templates/cursor/rules/odoo-20/ is authored. Currently treats v20 == v19 with pre-GA caveat.
